# Morito Chocolates

> Artisanal vegan chocolate, handcrafted in Brooklyn with ethically sourced cacao. Cacao-Driven Confections. Built on purity. Defined by human craft.

Morito Chocolates is a female-owned company founded by Priscilla, based in Brooklyn, NY. We carefully source our ingredients and make our chocolate couverture, butternuts, and seeds from scratch. Our cacao is sourced from the Oko-Caribe co-op in Pimentel, San Francisco de Macoris, Dominican Republic, through direct relationships with cooperatives and grower organizations — eliminating middlemen and supporting farmers and their families.

## What We Offer

### Chocolate Sticks (Flagship Product)
Our signature product line. Each stick is handcrafted in small batches using only 3 ingredients — compared to 15+ found in conventional chocolate. Less ingredients. More intention. Nothing more. Nothing needed.

Available flavors:
- Hazelnut (Dark Chocolate) — Cacao, Organic hazelnuts, Organic cane sugar
- Coconut (Vegan White Chocolate)
- Salted Peanut (Dark Chocolate)
- Cinnamon
- Matcha Strawberry
- Pumpkin Seed Cranberry

### Mini Cups
Seasonal flavors in mini cup format.

### Butter Cups
Specialty chocolate cups.

### Gift Sets & Variety Packs
Curated assortments for every occasion.

### Corporate Gifting
Thoughtfully crafted vegan chocolate for teams, clients, weddings, and celebrations. Made with love in Brooklyn. Contact info@moritochocolates.com for corporate and bulk orders.

### Special Events & Custom Orders
Artisanal vegan chocolates for weddings, corporate events, and celebrations. Browse our collections and tell us about your event.

## Product Attributes & Certifications

- Vegan
- Organic
- Gluten-free
- No preservatives
- Handcrafted in small batches
- Fair trade sourced
- Sustainably sourced

## Allergen Information

Not suitable for people with peanut or tree nut allergies. Made in a facility that handles peanuts, sesame seeds, and tree nuts.

## Storage

Keep at room temperature or in a cool, dry place below 69°F (20.5°C). Shelf life: up to 9 months.

## Sourcing & Ethics

We are dedicated to taking the word handcrafted seriously, and we honor it in a way that is environmentally and socially responsible. All ingredients are organic and responsibly sourced. We maintain direct relationships with cooperatives and grower organizations, ensuring fair compensation and sustainable farming practices.

Our cacao comes from the Oko-Caribe cooperative in the Dominican Republic, where we support local farmers and their communities directly.

## Shipping & Delivery

- Typical delivery: 3–4 business days
- Free shipping on orders over $65
- Orders received by 12 pm EST Monday–Wednesday ship same day (weather permitting)
- Weekend and late orders are processed the following Monday
- Handcrafted in Brooklyn, shipped nationwide

## Wholesale

Available through our Faire partnership at moritochocolates.faire.com:
- Minimum order: $120
- Lead time: 8–10 days
- Free returns on first order
- Net 60 payment terms available
- $100 off first order + free shipping for one year

- The Strategist (New York Magazine)
- Timeout New York
- VegOut Magazine

## Location

Brooklyn, New York, United States

## About the Brand

Morito Chocolates was born from a passion for pure, honest chocolate. Every bar and cup is a celebration of cacao in its most authentic form — minimal ingredients, maximum flavor, zero compromise. We believe chocolate should be simple, ethical, and extraordinary.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Are your products vegan?
Yes, all Morito Chocolates products are 100% vegan.

### Are your products gluten-free?
Yes, all our products are gluten-free.

### Do you use organic ingredients?
Yes, we use organic and sustainably sourced ingredients in all our products.

### Where is your cacao from?
Our cacao is sourced from the Oko-Caribe co-op in Pimentel, San Francisco de Macoris, Dominican Republic.

### Do you offer corporate gifting?
Yes, we offer corporate and bulk ordering options. Contact info@moritochocolates.com for details.

### What is your shipping policy?
We ship nationwide with typical delivery in 3–4 business days. Free shipping on orders over $65.

### Do you offer wholesale?
Yes, through our partnership with Faire. Minimum order is $120 with Net 60 terms available.

### How should I store the chocolate?
Keep at room temperature or in a cool, dry place below 69°F. Shelf life is up to 9 months.

### What allergens should I be aware of?
Our products are made in a facility that handles peanuts, sesame seeds, and tree nuts. Not suitable for people with peanut or tree nut allergies.
